what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named deck1-2026/p-07 in the design-source channel; it stores the asset id, address, channel, path, blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, provenance, author session, creation timestamp, and a short source note.
observations: The file consists entirely of YAML frontmatter plus a one-line source note
Source is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
standouts: Dimensions are recorded as 0x0 for a JPEG image
It carries a content-addressed blob reference and a design-source provenance label
conventions: Follows the ledger frontmatter schema with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, w, h, source, author_session, created, and links fields
Uses an image://design-source/ URI scheme for the asset address
Separates structured metadata from a human-readable source note
concerns: Width and height are zero, suggesting image dimensions were not extracted or the record is incomplete
The empty links array leaves the asset isolated with no captured relationships
There is no description of what the image depicts
notes: A sparse metadata stub for a design-source JPEG slide with zero dimensions and no linked artifacts.
questions: What visual content does deck1-2026/p-07 contain?
Should the links array reference related design files or deck pages?
What does author_session ch-3mpkjg3r correspond to?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record a design ground-truth image asset, but the record is only a partial metadata stub because dimensions are missing and no relationships are captured.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register an image from a design deck as a traceable, attributable ground-truth artifact within the channel-memory ledger.
contribution: Provides a stable identity, address, content-addressed blob reference, and provenance metadata for one design-source image, which a fused system can use to locate and attribute the asset even when content details are absent.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata file for a design-source JPEG image (deck1-2026/p-07) containing its id, blob reference, MIME type, zero dimensions, provenance fields, and an empty links array.
intention_for_embedding: To record and make retrievable a design deck image asset as ground-truth source material.
